evidenceBoundary: This is a pre-implementation handoff. Planned fixtures prove production transformations and failure handling; live browser and source-smoke rows must execute the real static page and public boundaries. No planned result proves investment performance, forecast accuracy, or recommendation correctness.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: common-date ratio alignment excludes unmatched legs
tests.description: Exact intersection, latest common date, adjustment mismatch, finite filtering, and no forward fill pass.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: duration confound blocks ratio-only constructive credit
tests.description: Duration sign and material-share thresholds plus the two-key classifier produce Mixed, never Constructive.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: aligned breadth plus current independent confirmation is constructive
tests.description: Both aligned pairs plus current independent improvement produce Constructive with invalidation.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: spread level and momentum remain independent
tests.description: Tight level and widening momentum remain separate and aggregate to mixed direction.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: configuration rejects unknown nonfinite credential and stale-contract shapes
tests.description: Invalid JSON paths fail loud before model or source calls; the complete config passes.

tests.testTitle: BS-001 duration-driven ratio improvement stays mixed
tests.description: The real page renders Mixed, the duration conflict, and no Constructive label.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-001 duration-driven ratio improvement stays mixed" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: BS-002 aligned ratios plus OAS confirmation are constructive
tests.description: The real page renders Constructive and a concrete invalidation from production model output.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-002 aligned ratios plus OAS confirmation are constructive" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: BS-003 tight but widening keeps level and momentum separate
tests.description: Both facts remain text-visible and confidence does not erase the conflict.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-003 tight but widening keeps level and momentum separate" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: BS-010 latest common date excludes unmatched leg
tests.description: Visible ratio date and table rows stop on the exact common date.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-010 latest common date excludes unmatched leg" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: complete repository selftest
tests.description: All pre-existing groups and the new Bond Regime group pass together after Scope 1.
tests.checkpointReason: Sequential gate after the first foundation slice.

tests.testTitle: Scope 1 regression set
tests.description: The complete current Scope 1 browser set passes together without skipped cases.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: curve impulse names all bull and bear quadrants
tests.description: Common-date short and long changes map to all four quadrants with noise handling.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: bear steepening and inflation pressure shorten duration
tests.description: Long-end pressure selects Shorten and maintains separate evidence fields.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: curve level cannot independently set duration posture
tests.description: Inversion stays level context and cannot create an immediate directional posture.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: breakeven uses common-date nominal minus real yields
tests.description: Misaligned dates are excluded and absent real rows remain unavailable.

tests.testTitle: BS-004 bull steepener retains defensive credit context
tests.description: Visible posture may extend while expression and conflict text remain defensive and high-quality.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-004 bull steepener retains defensive credit context" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: BS-005 bear steepener penalizes long duration most
tests.description: The page names Bear Steepener and Shorten while long Treasury shows the larger rate loss.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-005 bear steepener penalizes long duration most" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: Regression curve inversion alone leaves duration balanced or indeterminate
tests.description: The UI never converts inversion alone into Shorten or Extend.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "Regression curve inversion alone leaves duration balanced or indeterminate" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: complete repository selftest
tests.description: Existing groups and all current foundation groups pass together after Scope 2.
tests.checkpointReason: Sequential gate after the curve and duration foundation.

tests.testTitle: Scope 2 regression set
tests.description: The complete current Scope 2 browser set passes together without skipped cases.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: scenario decomposition preserves unit signs and sleeve applicability
tests.description: Carry rate spread and convexity sum exactly while Treasury spread is not applicable.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: TIPS maps nominal minus breakeven into real-yield shock
tests.description: Positive breakeven with unchanged nominal lowers real yield without a corporate spread term.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: break-even roots cover convexity zero and invalid discriminants
tests.description: Finite adverse roots are correct and impossible roots remain unavailable.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: reliability and rankability reject nonfinite or stale precision
tests.description: Non-finite input is invalid, stale input is unranked, and a finite large shock remains visible with warnings.

tests.testTitle: BS-006 six month mixed shock decomposes every sleeve
tests.description: Production controls and result tables expose all terms and correct applicability.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-006 six month mixed shock decomposes every sleeve" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: BS-007 oversized shock preserves estimate and lowers reliability
tests.description: Finite totals remain visible beside every required residual-risk warning.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-007 oversized shock preserves estimate and lowers reliability" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: BS-008 stale characteristic remains visible and unranked
tests.description: The stale field and review breach are visible while the sleeve has no rank or expression.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-008 stale characteristic remains visible and unranked" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: Scenario controls reject nonfinite input and persist only allowlisted assumptions
tests.description: Invalid current results are announced and persisted state contains only the design allowlist.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "Scenario controls reject nonfinite input and persist only allowlisted assumptions" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: complete repository selftest
tests.description: Existing and all Bond Regime pure groups pass after Scope 3.

tests.testTitle: Scope 3 regression set
tests.description: The complete current Scope 3 browser set passes together without skipped cases.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: official nominal Treasury fixture requires all configured maturities
tests.description: A valid fixture parses while missing or drifted required headers yield Unavailable, never partial numeric truth.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: official real Treasury fixture derives only aligned breakevens
tests.description: Valid real rows parse and only exact-date nominal and real intersections derive breakeven.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: source policy rejects credentials restricted fetch and persistence
tests.description: Credential fields, restricted live endpoints, and persisted manual values fail validation.

tests.testTitle: Live smoke returns a valid adjusted pair and official nominal headers or explicit unavailable source state
tests.description: Real RLDATA and Treasury boundaries return valid structure when reachable; outages are explicit and cannot become source-pass claims.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "Live smoke returns a valid adjusted pair and official nominal headers or explicit unavailable source state" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: BS-009 optional macro outage leaves truthful partial read
tests.description: Valid evidence remains, optional rows say Unavailable, and no missing value renders as zero.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-009 optional macro outage leaves truthful partial read" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: BS-013 restricted observation remains memory only
tests.description: Raw value and URL are absent from localStorage, caches, config, and normalized read.
tests.command: npx --no-install playwright test tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs --grep "BS-013 restricted observation remains memory only" --reporter=list

tests.testTitle: Cache-first refresh preserves successful families when one source fails

tests.description: Every configured instrument is in the existing collector path and existing inventory behavior remains intact.

tests.description: All existing and Bond Regime groups pass after Scope 4.

tests.testTitle: Scope 4 regression set
tests.description: The complete current Scope 4 browser set passes together without skipped cases.

tests.testTitle: Bond Regime: normalized read omits restricted values and nulls indeterminate action
tests.description: The tool read has exact derived fields and deep link with no raw manual value or URL.

tests.testTitle: inline script extraction and JSON parse checks for bond-regime-lab.html and bond-regime-universe.json
tests.description: Inline JavaScript compiles, config JSON parses, and every literal DOM id reference exists.
tests.command: PAGE=bond-regime-lab.html node -e 'const fs=require("node:fs");const p=process.env.PAGE;if(!p)throw new Error("PAGE is required");const h=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const scripts=[...h.matchAll(/<script(?![^>]*\bsrc=)[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi)].map(m=>m[1]).filter(s=>s.trim());if(!scripts.length)throw new Error("no inline script: "+p);scripts.forEach((s,i)=>{try{new Function(s)}catch(e){throw new Error("inline script "+(i+1)+": "+e.message)}});const ids=new Set([...h.matchAll(/\bid=["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const refs=scripts.flatMap(s=>[...s.matchAll(/getElementById\(\s*["\x27]([^"\x27]+)["\x27]\s*\)/g)].map(m=>m[1]));const missing=[...new Set(refs.filter(id=>!ids.has(id)))];if(missing.length)throw new Error("missing ids: "+missing.join(", "));JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync("bond-regime-universe.json","utf8"));console.log("OK page="+p+" inline="+scripts.length+" refs="+refs.length)'

tests.testTitle: path-scoped whitespace and changed-path inventory
tests.description: No whitespace errors or excluded feature-path changes exist and unrelated dirty work remains preserved.
tests.command: git diff --check -- bond-regime-lab.html bond-regime-universe.json notes/bond-regime-lab.md tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs tests/fixtures/bond-regime scripts/selftest.mjs scripts/fetch-bars.mjs rlg.js tools.json index.html rlnav.js README.md notes/README.md specs/003-bond-regime-and-scenario-lab && git status --short --untracked-files=all -- bond-regime-lab.html bond-regime-universe.json notes/bond-regime-lab.md tests/bond-regime-lab.spec.mjs tests/fixtures/bond-regime scripts/selftest.mjs scripts/fetch-bars.mjs rlg.js tools.json index.html rlnav.js README.md notes/README.md specs/003-bond-regime-and-scenario-lab
